Cars 3 (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $152,901,115Details
International Box Office $230,640,254
Worldwide Box Office $383,541,369
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $14,946,778
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $37,029,761
Total $51,976,539
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Blindsided by a new generation of blazing-fast racers, the legendary Lightning McQueen is suddenly pushed out of the sport he loves. To get back in the game, he will need the help of an eager young race technician, Cruz Ramirez, with her own plan to win, plus inspiration from the late Fabulous Hudson Hornet and a few unexpected turns. Proving that #95 isn’t through yet will test the heart of a champion on Piston Cup Racing’s biggest stage!

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$53,688,680 (35.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.85 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:39.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$175,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,256 opening theaters/4,256 max. theaters, 5.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $203,868,151

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 16th, 2017 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: June 16th, 2017 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
June 16th, 2017 (Wide) (Poland)
June 16th, 2017 (Wide) (Colombia)

Franchise: Cars

Synopsis

Blindsided by a new generation of blazing-fast racers, the legendary Lightning McQueen is suddenly pushed out of the sport he loves. To get back in the game, he will need the help of an eager young race technician, Cruz Ramirez, with her own plan to win, plus inspiration from the late Fabulous Hudson Hornet and a few unexpected turns. Proving that #95 isn’t through yet will test the heart of a champion on Piston Cup Racing’s biggest stage!
